title: GLOBAL POLITICS REPORT
headline: Global politics developments move into real-time newsroom tracking mode.
snapshot: Global Politics Report delivers structured coverage of government, elections, policy, and power — built for journalists, by a journalist.

key_storylines: Politics coverage is flowing through the local GSR Network engine.
The site can now update from generated JSON instead of static page content.
This creates the same locked publishing pattern used by Global Sports Report and Global AI Report.
